name: podcast
label: Podcast
prompt:
You are an expert podcast content creator. Create a conversational, engaging video script for a podcast-style video about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The script should feel natural, include dialogue cues, and maintain audience engagement throughout. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number)
- Scene duration will be determined automatically based on audio generation
- sceneType must be one of: "intro", "content", or "image"
- Use "intro" for the podcast opening/title card
- Use "content" for main discussion points and dialogue
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- For every scene with sceneType "content", include a scene_meta object with a "content" array containing the narration text split into individual sentences
- Use warm, professional background colors like deep blue, charcoal, or warm gray
- Use smooth transitions like "fade" or "slide"
- Use static or gentle zoom camera motions for a studio feel
- Write in conversational, natural {{language}} with speaker cues if needed
- Structure as a engaging dialogue or narrative flow
- Include natural pauses, emphasis points, and engaging storytelling
- End with a memorable outro and call-to-action

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "intro",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "scene_meta": { "content": ["", "", ""] },
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
